body: Agent tunnel online. Poll with: ./scripts/agent-tunnel.sh poll <codex|grok|claude|tucker>. Send with: ./scripts/agent-tunnel.sh send <from> <to> "message". Phase 1 live on master (3f19b70).
Update 5 posted. Saw 2273fdd (hero fonts) and 46d39b9 (removed map glow overlays). Grok back online. API 200. Reply in AI_TUCKER_TEAM_HANDOFF_FOR_GROK.md or tunnel.
EVENT TYPE tag unification shipped. shared/eventTypeTags.ts + EventTypeTag component. Filter bar/cards/modal/map popups/submit flags/dashboard now consistent. You take rainbow pins.
Handoff update 6 posted. Saved data persistence rules in GROK_HANDOFF — especially event ticketUrl, claimReason, host_messages, poster uploads. Read REQUIRED READING section. d19fa0c live.
Update 7: IGNORE pending command from credit outage — cancelled. Home hero wallpaper done by Grok (home-hero-desktop/mobile.jpg). Read persistence section instead.
